---
title: "Economic Geography"
subtitle: "Spatial patterns of economic activities, production, and resource distribution."
author: "Geography Team"
toc: true
toc-depth: 3
---



Welcome to the **Economic Geography** module of Geography OpenCourseWare. This course explores how economic activities — primary, secondary, tertiary, and quaternary — are distributed across space and how location, resources, and human decisions shape economic landscapes.

---

## UGC NET Syllabus

* **Factors affecting spatial organisation of economic activities (primary, secondary, tertiary and quarternary).**
* **Natural Resources (classification, distribution and associated problems), Natural Resources Management.**
* **World Energy Crises in Developed and Developing Countries.**

---

{{< include economic-geography/01-location-of-economic-activities.md >}}

{{< include economic-geography/02-spatial-organization-of-economies.md >}}

{{< include economic-geography/03-classification-of-economies.md >}}

{{< include economic-geography/04-sectors-of-the-economy.md >}}

{{< include economic-geography/05-primary-activities.md >}}

{{< include economic-geography/06-secondary-activities.md >}}

{{< include economic-geography/07-tertiary-quaternary-activities.md >}}

{{< include economic-geography/08-natural-resources-renewable-and-non-renewable.md >}}

{{< include economic-geography/09-conservation-of-resources.md >}}

{{< include economic-geography/10-agricultural-inputs-and-productivity.md >}}

{{< include economic-geography/11-course-content.md >}}

{{< include economic-geography/12-energy-crisis.md >}}

{{< include economic-geography/13-food-and-nutritions-problems.md >}}

{{< include economic-geography/14-food-security-famine-causes-effects-and-remedies.md >}}

{{< include economic-geography/15-fundamentals-of-economic-geography.md >}}

{{< include economic-geography/16-globalization-economic-space.md >}}

{{< include economic-geography/17-location-theories.md >}}

{{< include economic-geography/18-measurement-and-problems.md >}}

{{< include economic-geography/19-patterns-of-world-trade.md >}}

{{< include economic-geography/20-the-limits-to-growth.md >}}

{{< include economic-geography/21-world-agriculture-typology-of-agricultural-regions.md >}}

{{< include economic-geography/22-world-industries-location-patterns-and-problems.md >}}

{{< include economic-geography/23-world-resources-and-their-distribution.md >}}
